data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for governance mode and visibility controls.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the governance mode and visibility controls, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or records related to these specific controls. The linked use case mentions the need for governance mode and visibility controls, yet there is no evidence that they have been created or validated in the current saga run. Therefore, the requirement remains unfulfilled due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: Governance mode and visibility controls are not validated or present.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add governance mode validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that governance mode and visibility controls are implemented and functioning.
